publishedAbstract: - mds crash with assert condition `sessions!= 0` for the thread `mds-rank-fin`.- mds crashes in finisher thread `mds-rank-fin` while attempting to send a reply back to the client after a journal flush or I/O operation has completed `Server::reply_client_request`. ~~~ # ceph crash ls--format json-pretty | jq '.[] | del(.timestamp,.utsname_hostname,.crash_id,.archived?,.entity_name,.os_id,.os_name,.os_version,.os_version_id,.utsname_sysname,.utsname_version)' {"assert_condition": "sessions!= 0", "assert_file": "/builddir/build/BUILD/ceph-19.2.1/src/mds/SessionMap.cc", "assert_func": "void SessionMap::hit_session(Session*)", "assert_line": 1103, "assert_msg": "/builddir/build/BUILD/ceph-19.2.1/src/mds/SessionMap.cc: In function 'void SessionMap::hit_session(Session*)' thread 7ff4f95dc640 time 2026-03-25T02:12:14.317847+0000\n/builddir/build/BUILD/ceph-19.2.1/src/mds/SessionMap.cc: 1103: FAILED ceph_assert(sessions!= 0)\n", "assert_thread_name": "mds-rank-fin", "backtrace": ["/lib64/libc.so.6(+0x3fc30) [0x7ff505281c30]", "/lib64/libc.so.6(+0x8d02c) [0x7ff5052cf02c]", "raise()", "abort()", "(ceph::__ceph_assert_fail(char const*, char const*, int, char const*)+0x178) [0x7ff505937c88]", "/usr/lib64/ceph/libceph-common.so.2(+0x183ded) [0x7ff505937ded]", "ceph-mds(+0x45cf5c) [0x555b42eabf5c]", "(Server::reply_client_request(boost::intrusive_ptr const&, boost::intrusive_ptr const&)+0x693) [0x555b42c76623]", "(Server::respond_to_request(boost::intrusive_ptr const&, int)+0x153) [0x555b42c76d63]", "ceph-mds(+0x234213) [0x555b42c83213]", "(MDSContext::complete(int)+0x5c) [0x555b42eaf36c]", "(MDSIOContextBase::complete(int)+0x36c) [0x555b42eaf82c]", "(MDSLogContextBase::complete(int)+0x53) [0x555b42eaf983]", "(Finisher::finisher_thread_entry()+0x17d) [0x7ff5059fa0cd]", "/lib64/libc.so.6(+0x8b2ea) [0x7ff5052cd2ea]", "/lib64/libc.so.6(+0x1103c0) [0x7ff5053523c0]"], "ceph_version": "19.2.1-292.el9cp", "process_name": "ceph-mds", "stack_sig": "f2d3adfcc2047367f6ff67075137f8477e8a3c31702ac83e5a5ee2fda67de4da", "utsname_machine": "x86_64", "utsname_release": "5.14.0-570.80.1.el9_6.x86_64" ~~~
